questions.text: [GATE] The marks of four students are 77, 22, 20 and 49. What is their average mark?
[SSC] A shopkeeper buys an article for Rs. 258 and gains 15%. Find the selling price.
questions.explanation: Selling price = CP x (100 + profit%)/100 = 258 x 115/100 = 296.

questions.text: [GATE] A can finish a work in 13 days and B can finish the same work in 17 days. In how many days can they finish it together?
